zh.Nettlestead, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可內特萊斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Philip Wentworth於1401年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，他的父親Roger Wentworth27歲，母親Margery Despenser4歲。他於1447年與Mary Clifford在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1464年登記服兵役。他於1459年被列為sheriff of suffolk 。他去世於1464年5月18日在英國英格蘭越可爾米德勒哈姆享年63歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可登維其格也福利亞斯 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Philip Wentworth于1401年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可內特萊斯亞德时，他的父亲Roger Wentworth27岁，母亲Margery Despenser4岁。他于1447年与Mary Clifford在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1464年登记服兵役。他于1459年被列为sheriff of suffolk 。他去世于1464年5月18日在英国英格兰越可爾米德勒哈姆享年63岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可登維其格也福利亞斯 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Philip Wentworth was born in 1401, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Wentworth, was 27 and his mother, Margery Despenser, was 4. He married Mary Clifford in 1447, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1464. In 1459, his occupation is listed as sheriff of suffolk . He died on 18 May 1464, in Middleham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Philip Wentworth est né en 1401, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Wentworth, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margery Despenser, avait 4 ans. Il a épousé Mary Clifford en 1447, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1464. En 1459, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of suffolk . Il est décédé le 18 mai 1464, à Middleham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Philip Wentworth 1401 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Wentworth 27 und seine Mutter Margery Despenser 4. Er hat 1447 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England Mary Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1464 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1459 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of suffolk  aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Mai 1464 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Middleham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Philip Wentworth è nato il nel 1401 nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Wentworth, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margery Despenser, aveva 4 anni. Lui sposato Mary Clifford nel 1447, nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1464. Nel 1459, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of suffolk . Morì il 18 maggio 1464, nel Middleham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Philip Wentworthが1401年にイギリスイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Roger Wentworthは27歳，母Margery Despenserは4歳であった。1447年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンでMary Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1464年に兵役登録をした。1459年，職業はsheriff of suffolk と記録されている。彼は1464年5月18日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレハムで63歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクダンウィチグレイフリアルズ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Philip Wentworth(이)가 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Wentworth(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Despenser(은)는 4세였다. 그는 1447년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 Mary Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1464년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1459년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of suffolk 이었다. 그는 1464년 5월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 미들레함에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 던위치 그리프리아르스 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Philip Wentworth nasceu em 1401, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Wentworth, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margery Despenser, tinha 4 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Clifford em 1447, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1464. Em 1459, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of suffolk . Ele faleceu em 18 de maio de 1464, em Middleham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Philip Wentworth родился в 1401 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Wentworth было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Despenser, 4. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Clifford в 1447 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1464 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1459 годуработал по профессии sheriff of suffolk . Он умер 18 мая 1464 г. в местности миддлэам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности грифрярс приори, дунвич, суффолк, Англия.

sm.from 1459 to 1460: mai le 1459 e o'o I le 1460

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Philip Wentworth nació en 1401, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Wentworth, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margery Despenser, tenía 4 años. Se casó con Mary Clifford en 1447, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1464. En 1459, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of suffolk . Murió el 18 de mayo de 1464, en Middleham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
